name: Fisher Stack & Wicker Outdoor Patio Chair, Rocking Chair Gray - Threshold™: Weather-Resistant, No Assembly Required
description:
Glide into comfort as you enjoy the gorgeous outdoors with this Fisher Stack Rocking Chair from Threshold™. This rocking chair features a weather-resistant steel frame covered with a woven back and seat for a breezy look that’s tough enough to stand up to rainy days and sunny days alike. Plus, the rocking chair is stackable for more convenient and space-saving storage between seasons. Have a seat and relax outside with family and friends on this stack rocking chair.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
